titles.title: Lord, Prepare Me to Be a Sanctuary

properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6 V1

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Lord, prepare me to be a sanctuary Pure and holy, tried and true With thanksgiving, I'll be a living Sanctuary for You

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: It is you, Lord Who came to save The heart and soul Of every man

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: It is you Lord Who knows my weakness Who gives me strength With thine own hand

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Lord prepare me to be a sanctuary Pure and Holy, tried and true With thanksgiving I'll be a living Sanctuary for you

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Lead Me on Lord From temptation Purify me From within

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Fill my heart with You holy spirit Take away all my sin
